---
title: "Experimental Designs Final Project"
author: "Yumna Rizvi"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

cookie <- read_excel("C:/Users/yumna/Downloads/Final_BakingData.xlsx")
cookie

```

```{r}

# flour and Temperature are treated as factors
cookie$Flour_Type <- as.factor(cookie$`Flour Type`)
cookie$Oven_Temp  <- as.factor(cookie$`Oven Temperature`)
cookie$Initial_Weight <- as.factor(cookie$`Initial Weight`)

```

```{r}
# ANOVA model 
model <- aov(`Percentage Loss` ~ Flour_Type + Oven_Temp + Flour_Type:Oven_Temp,
             data = cookie)
summary(model)

interaction.plot(x.factor = cookie$Oven_Temp, 
                 trace.factor = cookie$Flour_Type, 
                 response = cookie$`Percentage Loss`,
                 fun = base::mean, 
                 type = "b", pch = 19,
                 xlab = "Oven Temperature", 
                 ylab = "Mean Percentage Loss",
                 trace.label = "Flour Type",
                 main = "Interaction Plot: Temperature × Flour Type",
                 col = c("red", "blue", "green"))
interaction.plot(
  x.factor = cookie$Flour_Type,      
  trace.factor = cookie$Oven_Temp,   
  response = cookie$`Percentage Loss`,
  fun = base::mean,
  type = "b",
  pch = 19,
  lwd = 2,
  col = c("red", "blue", "darkgreen"),
  xlab = "Flour Type",
  ylab = "Mean Percentage Loss",
  trace.label = "Oven Temp.",
  main = "Interaction Plot: Temperature × Flour Type"
)

# ANOVA assumption plots
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(model)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# ANOVA quantitative assumptiomns
model <- aov(`Percentage Loss` ~ Flour_Type * Oven_Temp, data = cookie)
res <- residuals(model)

shapiro.test(res)
library(lmtest); dwtest(model)
library(car); leveneTest(res ~ interaction(cookie$Flour_Type, cookie$Oven_Temp))

# data meets all assumptions of ANOVA!

```



```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# boxplot for flour type
ggplot(cookie, aes(x = `Flour Type`, y = `Percentage Loss`, fill = `Flour Type`)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "red", outlier.shape = 16) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Percent Loss by Flour Type",
       subtitle = "Diamonds represent the Mean; Lines represent the Median",
       y = "Percentage Loss (%)") +
  theme_light()


# boxplot for oven temperature
ggplot(cookie, aes(x = factor(`Oven Temperature`), y = `Percentage Loss`, fill = factor(`Oven Temperature`))) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "red", outlier.shape = 16) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Percent Loss by Oven Temperature",
       subtitle = "Diamonds represent the Mean; Lines represent the Median",
       x = "Oven Temperature (°F)",
       y = "Percentage Loss (%)",
       fill = "Oven Temperature") + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "YlOrRd") +
  theme_light()

# summaries

library(dplyr)

flour_summary <- cookie %>%
  group_by(Flour_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    mean = mean(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

flour_summary

temp_summary <- cookie %>%
  group_by(Oven_Temp) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    mean = mean(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(`Percentage Loss`, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

temp_summary

names(flour_summary)[1] <- "Material"
names(temp_summary)[1]  <- "Temperature"
```
```{r}
# weight difference

cookie$weight_difference <- cookie$`Initial Weight` - cookie$`Final Weight`

# ANOVA model with raw weight loss
model_raw <- aov(weight_difference ~ Flour_Type * Oven_Temp, data = cookie)
summary(model_raw)

# Interaction Plot for Raw Weight Loss
interaction.plot(x.factor = cookie$Oven_Temp, 
                 trace.factor = cookie$Flour_Type, 
                 response = cookie$weight_difference,
                 fun = mean, 
                 type = "b", pch = 19,
                 xlab = "Oven Temperature (°F)", 
                 ylab = "Mean Weight Loss (g)",
                 trace.label = "Flour Type",
                 col = c("red", "blue", "green"))

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(model_raw)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

library(ggplot2)

# Boxplot for Flour Type 
ggplot(cookie, aes(x = Flour_Type, y = weight_difference, fill = Flour_Type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "red") +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Raw Weight Loss by Flour Type", y = "Weight Loss (g)") +
  theme_light()

# Boxplot for Temperature 
ggplot(cookie, aes(x = Oven_Temp, y = weight_difference, fill = Oven_Temp)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "red") +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Raw Weight Loss by Temperature", x = "Temperature (°F)", y = "Weight Loss (g)") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "YlOrRd") +
  theme_light()


```

```{r}
library(effsize)

# Cohen's d: Flour Type comparisons

cohen_flour_AP_Bread <- cohen.d(
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "All-purpose"],
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "Gluten-free"],
  pooled = TRUE
)

# highest Cohen's d

cohen_flour_AP_Coconut <- cohen.d(
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "All-purpose"],
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "Coco. Flour"],
  pooled = TRUE
)

cohen_flour_Bread_Coconut <- cohen.d(
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "Gluten-free"],
  cookie$`Percentage Loss`[cookie$Flour_Type == "Coco. Flour"],
  pooled = TRUE
)

cohen_flour_AP_Bread
cohen_flour_AP_Coconut
cohen_flour_Bread_Coconut
```
